name: Psychic Bounder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サイコ・バウンダー
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Jinzo" or 1 Spell/Trap that specifically lists that card in its text, from your Deck to your hand. When another monster you control is attacked by an opponent's monster, before damage calculation: You can destroy both the attacking monster and this card. You can only use each effect of "Psychic Bounder" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Jinzo" or 1 Spell/Trap that specifically lists that card in its text, from your Deck to your hand. When another monster you control is attacked by an opponent's monster, before damage calculation: You can destroy both the attacking monster and this card. You can only use each effect of "Psychic Bounder" once per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster before damage calculation
